name: YTLite
subtitle: Lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+
description: A lightweight YouTube client with SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, and up to 1080p playback. No ads, no tracking, no dependencies.

apps.name: YTLite
apps.subtitle: YouTube client for iOS 12+
apps.localizedDescription: A lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+. No ads, no tracking. Features: SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, 1080p playback, background audio, PiP, subtitles, and more.
